<!-- indicator: fig-dc-impact-hlth-issue -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-dc-impact-hlth-issue
#| fig-cap: 'The Impact of Health Issues in Dutchess County (n = 106)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing The Impact of Health Issues in Dutchess County (n = 106).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-dc-impact-hlth-issue", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
